summary: Update mode testing complete. Verified complete UI redesign from 'Fantasy Sunset' to dual-theme system: 'Midnight Neon' (purple/violet) for GM pages and 'Electric Tundra' (blue/cyan) for Player pages. Landing page uses neutral bridging theme with purple/cyan gradient. All 8 theme-specific tests passed. New fonts (Outfit, Manrope, Cinzel) properly applied. ThemeContext.js correctly switches themes based on routes.

landing_page_theme.title: Landing page with new purple/cyan gradient theme
landing_page_theme.details: Landing page displays with dark background (#080A1A), purple/cyan gradient accents, ROOK logo with Cinzel font, 'Start Your Quest' CTA button
landing_page_theme.evidence: Test 'Landing page loads with new purple/cyan gradient theme' passed

pricing_tiers.title: Pricing tiers display correctly
pricing_tiers.details: All 4 tiers visible: Free ($0), Player (TBD/Coming Soon), Game Master ($3.99/mo), Legendary ($5.99/mo)
pricing_tiers.evidence: Test 'Pricing tiers display correctly on landing page' passed

login_flow.title: Login flow works correctly
login_flow.details: Login with test credentials successful, redirects to /home (Unified Dashboard)

unified_dashboard.title: Unified Dashboard with new theme
unified_dashboard.details: Dashboard shows 'ROOKIE QUEST KEEPER' header with new fonts, GM SIDE section with purple accents, Player Features section with 'Coming Soon' overlay
unified_dashboard.evidence: Test 'Unified Dashboard displays correctly with new theme' passed

campaign_dashboard_gm_theme.title: Campaign Dashboard with Midnight Neon (purple) theme
campaign_dashboard_gm_theme.details: Campaign Dashboard displays with dark background, purple sidebar, 'CAMPAIGN TOOLS' sections, 'Open GM Screen' button with purple styling
campaign_dashboard_gm_theme.evidence: Test 'Campaign Dashboard displays with purple GM theme' passed

gm_screen_theme.title: GM Screen with Midnight Neon (purple) theme
gm_screen_theme.details: GM Screen displays with dark background (#0B0B0D), purple accents, 'GM TOOLS' sidebar, Quick Dice panel
gm_screen_theme.evidence: Test 'GM Screen displays with Midnight Neon purple theme' passed

character_sheet_theme.title: Character Sheet with Electric Tundra (cyan) theme
character_sheet_theme.details: Character Sheet displays with dark blue background (#050A30), cyan accents on buttons and highlights, Combat tab with cyan gradient
character_sheet_theme.evidence: Test 'Character Sheet displays with Electric Tundra cyan theme' passed

navigation.title: Navigation between pages works correctly
navigation.details: Navigation between Dashboard → Campaign → GM Screen → Character Sheet → Dashboard all working
navigation.evidence: Test 'Navigation between pages works correctly' passed

theme_implementation.css_variables: Dual theme system implemented via CSS variables in index.css with [data-theme='gm'] and [data-theme='player'] selectors
theme_implementation.theme_context: ThemeContext.js manages theme switching based on routes - GM routes use purple, Player routes use cyan, Landing uses neutral

color_schemes.landing: Neutral dark (#080A1A) with purple/cyan gradient accents

issues.description: Login page still uses old Fantasy Sunset background image (pink/orange/purple gradient). Consider updating to match new theme.
Logout button in UnifiedDashboard header lacks data-testid attribute for easier testing
